case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, VS. LONNIE WILLHOLTE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLHOLTE, LONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 KEARNY STREET, #404, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94108, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
